title: デビュー戦の後に・倒したいアイツ

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon has wowed us with an excellent
debut!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
This new generation is shaping up impressively,
with Narita Brian being a hot contender for the
Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
What kind of races can we expect to see from
them both? I can't wait!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Nice! That's my big debut settled, Teach!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Thanks! But the real battle starts now.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna have to toughen up good if I want
some proper fights in the future!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If there's one thing Hishi Amazon never lacks, it's
motivation. Not wanting it to go to waste, I start
to think about our next goal immediately.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since she's looking to challenge the best of the
best, we should probably aim for the biggest
event possible.
choice_data_list:
How about running in the Hanshin Juvenile
Fillies?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Wait, isn't that a junior G1 race?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
So we're gonna gear up for next year's G1 races,
huh? I like it! Bring on the Hanshin J.F.!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I make to leave the Nakayama Racecourse behind
us, but Hishi Amazon stops me and gives me a
serious look.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I've debuted, and decided on the next race to
prepare for.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
But before we enter the thick of it, I've gotta tell
you something.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
There's someone in particular I wanna challenge
to a one-on-one in the Twinkle Series.
choice_data_list: I feel like I know who...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hehe... You know, huh?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: That's right—it's Narita Brian!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian is a runner so strong, she's become
quite the topic, even among the trainers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon has been watching her for quite
some time.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: She's a real beast, Teach.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yup. I challenged her to a one-on-one right after
I came to Tracen, and I didn't even come close to
beating her.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I was so frustrated at my loss that I kept trying to
catch up to her, determined to beat her, but
during the process, I realized somethin'.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
The reason she runs isn't 'cause she wants glory or
'cause she wants to inspire others.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
It's 'cause she's got a beast inside of her. She runs
because there's no way for her to stay put. That's
why she's so strong!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Just the thought of facing off against her shakes
me to my core! I just know a battle with her at a
big race would be real awesome!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I wanna go head-to-head with her somewhere
dazzling!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon's eyes shine brilliantly with
determination.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I don't care what happens, but this battle's gotta take place no matter what—don't you forget that, Teach!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Out of nowhere...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Brian!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
What a coincidence, runnin' into you here today! I
actually just had my debut race and—

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Wait, did you come to see me race?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Tch. I was just passing through.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
That can't be true! You just came from the
entrance!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! I see what's going on here.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
This was no ordinary race, after all. Of course
you'd get a little curious after hearin' that the one
and only Hishi Amazon was debuting!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Still, I didn't think you'd drop by to see me!
Thanks a lot, Brian!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Let's give it our all in the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Whatever.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Aww, what're you gettin' all shy on me for? Hey,
your tape's all crooked!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Bug off.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Got any dinner plans? If not, wanna eat together?
choice_data_list: (They sure are friendly with each other.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite a few bumps along the way, Hishi
Amazon's debut race goes well, and we've got the
Hanshin J.F. on our radar next!
